blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 35".
